---
name: Phase Gate Before Implementation
description: No code edits until vision/arch/tech/testing/ROADMAP/phase-tasks are filled in and signed off.
type: feedback
---

G's rule: no code until the full phase-gate doc set is complete and signed off. Template stubs = deny. Sign-off required before any implementation begins.

**How to apply:** Before writing code, confirm: vision.md, architecture.md, technologies.md, testing strategy, ROADMAP, and phase-task files all exist with real content (not stubs).
